title: begonia consanguinea
intro: Begonia consanguinea, also known as the iron cross begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Begonia consanguinea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
